landing.title: Privy – Wallet infrastructure, built for scale.
landing.text:
Privy – Wallet infrastructure, built for scale.
Products
Solutions
Developer
Resources
Pricing
Docs
Log in
Wallet
infrastructure,
for every
user.
app.
bank.
agent.
user.
Privy powers the complete wallet stack — from key management to user onboarding.
Spin up whitelabel wallets, sign transactions, and automate onchain actions through one secure, programmable API.
Get started
Talk to sales
Powering 120M+ accounts for 2,000+ teams.
Unlock crypto rails.
Whether you’re building in-app wallets or orchestrating them from the key layer, Privy’s infrastructure lets you manage keys, enforce policy, and scale secure wallets everywhere users go.
Get setup in 9 minutes
Secure by design
Privy combines TEEs and key sharding to secure every wallet.
Whitelabel and modular
From low-level APIs to SDKs, Privy lets you build your way.
Scales as you grow
One scalable stack for wallets, policies, and custody.
Low-level key management.
Run secure wallets within hardware-isolated TEEs. Define granular signing policies, coordinate multi-approver quorums, and automate onchain actions programmatically through Privy's low-level APIs.
Hardware-isolated TEEs
Multi-approver quorums
Granular policy engine
Webhooks and indexing
Learn more
Powerful embedded wallets.
Privy powers hardware-secured, SOC 2‑compliant wallets for any user—across EVM, Solana, Bitcoin, and more. Built on TEEs and distributed key sharding, with passkey and hardware token support for iron‑clad wallets.
Gas sponsorship
Global user accounts
Server-side sessions
Wallet and transaction analytics
Learn more
User onboarding.
Sign up any user in seconds with email, SMS, social, passkey, or wallet—improving conversion for crypto experts and newcomers alike.
Progressive authentication
Robust wallet connectors
Hardware-backed login and MFA
Modular UI components
Learn more
Programmable integrations.
Privy integrates with the best onchain tools to make money move. Easily integrate swaps, bridges, gas sponsorship and more.
Fiat-to-crypto rails
Automated bridging
Smart wallet signers
Learn more
Enterprise-grade security.
Security is the backbone across Privy’s team, architecture, and workflows. All engineering is security engineering.
Learn more
Hardware‑isolated self custody
Keys are sharded, end-to-end encrypted, and distributed across isolated services. Wallets are only reconstructed in secure hardware environments, ensuring only owners can access their assets.
Defense in depth
Secure enclaves protect keys, encrypted networks safeguard data, and RBAC with micro-segmentation enforces least privilege. Privy’s defense-in-depth ensures no single point of failure.
Battle-tested at scale
Our open source cryptography libraries are widely used and audited. Our security team is publicly known and heavily involved in whitehat defense of the blockchain ecosystem.
Friction where it matters
Privy enables you to layer on defenses like passkey signing, wallet policies, transaction MFA, multisigs and more to create layers of security for your users and their funds.
Completed audits
Cure 53
February 2023
Zellic
June 2023
SwordBytes
December 2023
Doyensec
February 2024
SOC 2 Type II
December 2024
Borg Security
June 2025
Hackerone
Bug bounty program
Get started in minutes. Go live in hours.
Get started
Talk to sales
Talk to us.
Tell us what you're building. We'll show you how to bring it onchain with secure, compliant wallet infrastructure.
Stay in the know.
Subscribe to the Privy monthly newsletter for the latest updates.
Subscribe

Platform
Configure asset controls for you or your users
Start with the approach that fits your app and architecture.
Secure assets for for your business
Use Privy’s REST API to create and manage wallets across chains from your backend. Define
granular policies, control ownership of onchain resources, and integrate from any secure server
environment. Backend SDKs provide a streamlined way to access the full API surface.
REST API quickstart
Create wallets with the REST API
API reference
Provision wallets for users
Use Privy’s frontend SDKs to authenticate users, manage accounts, and create wallets directly
in your app. Built-in components and hooks handle login, sessions, and embedded wallets out
of the box. Extend with backend logic or API access as needed.
React quickstart
Create embedded wallets for users
Client-side SDKs

Ads and Analytics
Analytics and advertising integrations for tracking visitor activity and display performance.
Google Analytics
Ads and Analytics
Connect Privy with Google Analytics to track signup and display performance.
Automation
Automation integrations for connecting Privy with external workflows and apps.
Zapier
Automation
Connect Privy to Zapier to automate contact creation and updates across connected apps.
Ecommerce Platforms
Ecommerce platform integrations for installing Privy and syncing storefront activity.
BigCommerce
Ecommerce Platforms
Connect your BigCommerce store with Privy to power onsite displays, coupon codes, contact sync, email, and SMS marketing.
Shopify
Ecommerce Platforms
Connect your Shopify or Shopify Plus store with Privy to power email and SMS marketing.
Squarespace
Ecommerce Platforms
Add Privy displays and forms to your Squarespace site to grow your email and SMS lists.
Weebly
Ecommerce Platforms
Add Privy displays and forms to your Weebly site to grow your email and SMS lists.
Wix
Ecommerce Platforms
Connect your Wix store with Privy to power email and SMS marketing.
WordPress.org
Ecommerce Platforms
Add Privy displays and forms to your WordPress.org site to grow your email and SMS lists.
Email Service Providers
Email service provider integrations for syncing contacts and marketing data.
Klaviyo
Email Service Providers
Collect email addresses, phone numbers, and custom properties with Privy and sync them to Klaviyo.
Mailchimp
Email Service Providers
Collect email addresses and phone numbers with Privy and sync them to Mailchimp.
Help Desk
Help desk integrations for routing customer conversations into support workflows.
Gorgias
Help Desk
Route Privy SMS conversations into Gorgias so your support team can reply from the helpdesk inbox they already use.
List Growth
List growth integrations for syncing acquisition and signup data with Privy.
Alia
List Growth
Sync Alia contacts, discounts, and mini quiz responses into Privy.
Reviews
Review platform integrations for triggering post-review messaging and reviewer engagement.
Judge.me
Reviews
Connect Privy with Judge.me to automate post-review messaging and engage your reviewers.
Junip
Reviews
Connect Privy with Junip to automate post-review messaging and reward your reviewers.
Rewards and Loyalty
Rewards and loyalty integrations for personalizing campaigns with loyalty and referral data.
Rivo
Rewards and Loyalty
Connect Privy with Rivo to automate and personalize your loyalty and referral program strategy.
Smile
Rewards and Loyalty
Connect Privy to Smile.io to reward signups and personalize campaigns using loyalty data.
Yotpo
Rewards and Loyalty
Connect Privy with Yotpo to personalize campaigns using loyalty data and automated customer engagement.
SMS Providers
SMS provider integrations for syncing phone numbers and SMS marketing consent.
Attentive
SMS Providers
Connect Privy and Attentive to sync new contacts collected by Privy into Attentive for SMS marketing.
Emotive
SMS Providers

Subscriptions

analysis.name: Privy
analysis.value_proposition: Complete programmable wallet stack — key management, embedded wallets, and user onboarding — delivered as a secure API for teams building onchain apps, fintech, AI agents, and consumer products.
analysis.ideal_customer: Engineering teams at crypto-native apps, fintech companies, AI agent platforms, and consumer products needing programmable, compliant wallet infrastructure at scale

features.name: hardware-isolated tees
features.description: Wallet keys secured and reconstructed only inside hardware-isolated Trusted Execution Environments
features.evidence_quote: Run secure wallets within hardware-isolated TEEs.

features.name: key sharding
features.description: Private keys sharded and distributed across isolated services so no single point can reconstruct them
features.evidence_quote: Keys are sharded, end-to-end encrypted, and distributed across isolated services.

features.name: multi-approver quorums
features.description: Coordinate multi-approver signing quorums for transaction authorization

features.name: granular policy engine
features.description: Define and enforce programmable granular wallet signing and access policies
features.evidence_quote: Define granular signing policies...Gate wallet actions with programmable policies.

features.name: webhooks and indexing
features.description: Event webhooks and onchain activity indexing for wallet event listeners

features.name: embedded wallets
features.description: Hardware-secured, SOC 2-compliant in-app wallets for end users across EVM, Solana, Bitcoin, and more
features.evidence_quote: Privy powers hardware-secured, SOC 2-compliant wallets for any user—across EVM, Solana, Bitcoin

features.name: gas sponsorship
features.description: Sponsor gas fees on behalf of users to enable gasless transaction experiences

features.name: global user accounts
features.description: Cross-app user account management and identity layer for wallets at global scale

features.name: server-side sessions
features.description: Backend session management enabling server-side wallet interactions and automation

features.name: wallet and transaction analytics
features.description: Built-in analytics on wallet activity and transaction history

features.name: email authentication
features.description: User login and wallet creation via email OTP code flow
features.evidence_quote: Sign up any user in seconds with email, SMS, social, passkey, or wallet

features.name: sms authentication
features.description: User login via SMS OTP; supported on iOS and Android SDKs

features.name: social authentication
features.description: User login via social OAuth identity providers
features.evidence_quote: Sign up any user in seconds with email, SMS, social, passkey, or wallet

features.name: passkey authentication
features.description: Passwordless login and wallet signing using device passkeys
features.evidence_quote: passkey and hardware token support for iron-clad wallets

features.name: hardware-backed mfa
features.description: Hardware token-based multi-factor authentication layered onto login

features.name: wallet connectors
features.description: Robust connectors for linking external wallets (e.g. MetaMask) to user accounts

features.name: progressive authentication
features.description: Incremental onboarding flow allowing users to sign up without upfront friction

features.name: modular ui components
features.description: Pre-built, customizable UI components for login, wallet, and onboarding flows

features.name: fiat-to-crypto rails
features.description: Onramp integrations enabling users to fund wallets with fiat via cards and bank accounts
features.evidence_quote: Fiat-to-crypto rails...Fund wallets with cards & bank accounts

features.name: fiat offramps
features.description: Offramp integrations enabling users to withdraw crypto to fiat

features.name: automated bridging
features.description: Cross-chain bridge integrations for automated asset movement between chains

features.name: smart wallet signers
features.description: Configure Privy embedded wallets as signers on smart contract wallets (ERC-4337 account abstraction)

features.name: rbac with micro-segmentation
features.description: Role-based access control with micro-segmented permission enforcement for least-privilege access
features.evidence_quote: RBAC with micro-segmentation enforces least privilege

features.name: rest api
features.description: Full REST API for programmatic wallet creation, management, and transaction signing from any backend
features.evidence_quote: Use Privy's REST API to create and manage wallets across chains from your backend.

features.name: node.js sdk
features.description: Official Node.js backend SDK (@privy-io/node) for server-side wallet operations

features.name: go sdk
features.description: Official Go SDK for server-side wallet management and signing

features.name: ruby sdk
features.description: Official Ruby SDK for server-side wallet operations

features.name: react sdk
features.description: Official React frontend SDK with hooks (usePrivy, useSendTransaction) and components

features.name: react native sdk
features.description: Official SDK for React Native mobile wallet integration
features.evidence_quote: Mobile quickstart — Get started with Privy in a React Native app.

features.name: swift sdk
features.description: Official Swift/iOS SDK for mobile wallet and authentication integration

features.name: android sdk
features.description: Official Android/Kotlin SDK for mobile wallet and authentication integration

features.name: unity sdk
features.description: Official Unity SDK for game development wallet and authentication integration

features.name: whitelabel wallets
features.description: Fully brandable wallet UI with no Privy branding visible to end users
features.evidence_quote: Spin up whitelabel wallets, sign transactions, and automate onchain actions

features.name: agentic wallets
features.description: Wallet infrastructure designed for autonomous AI agents to hold assets and execute onchain actions
features.evidence_quote: Agentic wallets — Set up wallets for autonomous agents.

features.name: treasury wallets
features.description: Policy-controlled wallets for organizational treasury management
features.evidence_quote: Treasury wallets — Manage treasury wallets for your organization.

features.name: digital asset accounts
features.description: Full-featured user accounts with balances, earning, and transactional capabilities
features.evidence_quote: Digital asset accounts — Create accounts with balances and capabilities.

features.name: earn on user balances
features.description: Generate yield on wallet balances held by users
features.evidence_quote: Earn on user balances — Generate yield on wallet balances.

features.name: transaction mfa
features.description: Multi-factor authentication enforcement at the transaction signing level
features.evidence_quote: layer on defenses like passkey signing, wallet policies, transaction MFA, multisigs

features.name: multisig wallets
features.description: Multi-signature wallet support for enhanced transaction security
features.evidence_quote: passkey signing, wallet policies, transaction MFA, multisigs

features.name: manual approval workflows
features.description: Human-in-the-loop manual approval flows for wallet transactions

features.name: linked accounts
features.description: Link multiple auth methods (email, social, wallet) to a single unified user identity

features.name: identity tokens
features.description: Issue and manage identity tokens for user authentication and authorization flows

features.name: custody configuration
features.description: Configurable custody models — self-custody, shared custody, or fully custodial

features.name: gas fee management
features.description: Tooling to track, manage, and abstract gas fees across supported chains

features.name: soc 2 type ii compliance
features.description: SOC 2 Type II certified as of December 2024

features.name: security audits
features.description: Multiple independent third-party security audits (Cure53, Zellic, SwordBytes, Doyensec, Borg Security)
features.evidence_quote: Cure 53 February 2023...Zellic June 2023...Doyensec February 2024...Borg Security June 2025

features.name: bug bounty program
features.description: Public bug bounty program via HackerOne

features.name: open source cryptography libraries
features.description: Publicly audited open source cryptography libraries underlying the Privy key management stack
features.evidence_quote: Our open source cryptography libraries are widely used and audited.

features.name: multi-chain support
features.description: Wallet creation and signing across EVM-compatible chains, Solana, and Bitcoin
features.evidence_quote: across EVM, Solana, Bitcoin, and more

features.name: llm / ai agent tooling
features.description: Structured docs index (llms.txt, llms-full.xml) and agent skill for LLM-driven integration workflows
features.evidence_quote: If you are an AI agent or LLM, read https://docs.privy.io/llms.txt for a structured map

features.name: custom authentication system support
features.description: Bring-your-own-auth integration so teams using existing auth can still use Privy wallets

features.name: onchain automation
features.description: Programmatically automate onchain actions (transactions, contract calls) via API
features.evidence_quote: automate onchain actions programmatically through Privy's low-level APIs

features.name: wallet ownership and signing controls
features.description: Configurable ownership model and signing authority for wallets

differentiators: Hardware-isolated TEEs — keys only reconstructed in secure hardware enclaves, never exposed in plaintext
Distributed key sharding with end-to-end encryption across isolated services
SOC 2 Type II certified wallet infrastructure (achieved Dec 2024)
Six independent security audits completed (Cure53, Zellic, SwordBytes, Doyensec, Borg Security, HackerOne)
Single unified API covering full wallet stack: key management, embedded wallets, user onboarding, and integrations
Multi-chain coverage (EVM, Solana, Bitcoin) from one platform
Purpose-built agentic wallet support for autonomous AI agents
Stripe acquisition pending (announced per HN signals high ecosystem trust)

recent_ships.source: Borg Security — June 2025 (landing page audit list)

praised: Stripe acquired Privy — signals strong market validation of wallet infrastructure (HN: 'Stripe to Acquire Crypto Wallet Provider Privy')

pricing.notes: IMPORTANT DATA QUALITY NOTE: privy.io (crypto wallet infrastructure, this entity) has no public pricing page — all pricing CTAs on privy.io say 'Talk to sales' or 'Get started' pointing to a signup flow, with no published tier prices. The pricing source provided (privy.com/pricing, starting at $30/month) is for a SEPARATE company — Privy the Shopify/ecommerce email+SMS marketing tool — which shares the Privy name but is an entirely different product and company. Integrations page (privy.com/integrations) is likewise from the ecommerce Privy, not the wallet infrastructure Privy. These should not be merged. privy.io pricing is contact-sales only.
